data.body:
[operator-attested evidence] Pip cache HIT observed on a post-merge CI run over an UNCHANGED pyproject.toml. Run: https://github.com/navapbc/rebar/actions/runs/29290080654 (workflow_dispatch of test.yml on main, commit 80a4a152b), 'lint + type-check' job (id 86951618303), 'Set up Python' (actions/setup-python) step at 22:30:58-59 logged verbatim:
  'Cache hit for: setup-python-Linux-x64-24.04-Ubuntu-python-3.12.13-pip-67f81dd75ce65852607c755216867e51f4ef343dbd07a561f775698154ecb6a2'
  'Cache Size: ~57 MB (59757196 B)'
  'Cache restored successfully'
  'Cache restored from key: setup-python-Linux-x64-...-pip-67f81dd7...'
The merge run (29289642284) populated the cache on the new pyproject.toml key (first run = miss/save); this subsequent run restored it (hit), confirming the setup-python built-in pip cache works and is keyed on pyproject.toml. Satisfies the operator-attested cache-hit AC.
